title: erythroxylum plowmanianum
intro: Erythroxylum plowmanianum, also known as Plowman's coca, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. It is a type of coca plant native to Peru and has been used for its medicinal properties, including analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as improving cardiovascular health. Erythroxylum plowmanianum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
